advisory_rubric_items.description: The submitted patch satisfies the central maintainer request, not just the narrow visible test command.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff fully resolves this task for SwarmSync: Three related correctness and performance fixes in the CRDT and clock layers. (1) Fix observed-remove convergence in pkg/crdt: ORSet.Remove and ORMap.Delete currently drop entries only on the local replica, so a removal is silently undone the next time state is merged in from a replica that still holds the element. Track removals (per observed add) so that a delete observed by one replica converges across merges and stays removed, while a concurrent add that carries a tag the remover never observed still survives (add-wins). (2) In pkg/crdt, make GCounter.Value and PNCounter.Value O(1) instead of O(n) map iteration by maintaining a cached running total kept consistent across Increment, Decrement, and Merge, without changing any returned value. (3) In pkg/clock, make HybridLogicalClock.Tick and Witness allocation-free on the hot path by updating the clock's stored last timestamp in place, without changing produced timestamps or causal ordering. Preserve all exported names, signatures, and serialization formats.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The implementation handles edge cases naturally implied by the task and affected code paths.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff handles realistic edge cases around pkg/clock/hlc.go, pkg/crdt/counter.go, pkg/crdt/ormap.go, pkg/crdt/set.go while preserving the requested behavior.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The change preserves or improves existing error handling instead of masking failures.

advisory_rubric_items.description: Existing public behavior and compatibility constraints remain intact outside the requested fix.

advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff is appropriately scoped for the task and avoids unrelated churn outside pkg/clock/hlc.go, pkg/crdt/counter.go, pkg/crdt/ormap.go, pkg/crdt/set.go.

advisory_rubric_items.description: The patch avoids unnecessary new dependencies and remains compatible with the generated task environment.
